licensed_by.definition: the mother of one's father or mother
licensed_by.reading: one's father-or-mother = one's parent (parent def), so: the mother of x's parent is x's grandmother
licensed_by.span: the MOTHER of one's FATHER OR MOTHER

licensed_by.reading: a mother is a parent (mother def), and a parent of one's father-or-mother is a grandparent (grandparent def) => every grandmother is a grandparent
